name: ASRock X870 LIVEMIXER WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASRock X870 LIVEMIXER WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: ASRock creative-focused ATX motherboard with X870 chipset, DDR5 support and Wi-Fi 7.
